commands.review_summary:
The branch strips `anthropic/` from direct Anthropic Messages payload model ids, preserves slash-bearing ids for proxy/custom endpoints, adds targeted transport tests, and carries a JSONL tailer error-cause change already present on current main.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +49, Other 0. Total +56 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.5.22 put `model.id` directly into the Anthropic payload, and the linked issue supplies live 404 evidence for prefixed direct Anthropic ids. I did not run a live Anthropic call in this read-only review.
